name: Hammer Fall
description: Forge hammer striking with tremendous impact

prompts.label: forge hammer striking hot iron with tremendous ringing impact
prompts.text: forge hammer striking hot iron with tremendous ringing impact, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: blacksmith blow landing on anvil with deep metallic clang
prompts.text: blacksmith blow landing on anvil with deep metallic clang, Victorian clocktower, ratchet wrench click, oiled-machine rhythm, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, smooth fade out

prompts.label: heavy tool head connecting with workpiece decisively
prompts.text: heavy tool head connecting with workpiece decisively, locomotive engine room, tempered steel spring release, riveted iron solidity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, sustained resonance

prompts.label: iron sparks flying from hammer contact point
prompts.text: iron sparks flying from hammer contact point, blacksmith anvil yard, cast iron lever thrown, pneumatic power hiss, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, with natural decay

prompts.label: workshop ringing with the authority of completed strike
prompts.text: workshop ringing with the authority of completed strike, submarine pressure hull, copper pipe resonance ping, precision clockwork ticking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, smooth fade out
